rationale: Educ. Code §7.003 governs delegation of educational functions between the agency/board and school districts. It does not address tax exemptions or homestead valuation, so no conflict arises from the proposed change.
quote: An educational function not specifically delegated to the agency or the board under this code is reserved to and shall be performed by school districts or open-enrollment charter schools.
_note: Rule concerns authority allocation, not tax policy; no direct conflict with homestead exemption increase.
